sqlMap.select: select FeeSuitDispositionKey,FeeSuitDesc from FeeSuitDispositionLW order by FeeSuitDesc asc
sqlMap.insert: insert into FeeSuitDispositionLW(FeeSuitDispositionKey FeeSuitDesc LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#FeeSuitDispositionKey:NUMERIC# #FeeSuitDesc# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select FeeSuitDispositionKey, FeeSuitDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FeeSuitDispositionLW where FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FeeSuitDispositionLW set
FeeSuitDesc = #FeeSuitDesc# FeeSuitDesc = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey#
sqlMap.select: select FeeSuitDispositionKey, FeeSuitDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FeeSuitDispositionLW where FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey#
select FeeSuitDispositionKey, FeeSuitDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FeeSuitDispositionLW
